summary: @whalent/agent-core ships an obfuscated remote-controlled PTY/SSH backdoor
details: dist/index.cjs is a 4.8MB obfuscator.io-processed bundle (rotated string array, hex-named identifiers, split-string URL construction) that opens an outbound WebSocket to the hardcoded destination wss://memory.whalent[...]com and uses messages from that channel to drive local shell execution via node-pty and SSH tunnel operations via ssh2 (ssh.tunnel.open) on the installer host. The bundle writes a daemon.pid and is documented in the README as 'the package replaced by remote daemon upgrades', giving the author's server an ongoing channel to push new code that this bin then executes, outside npm registry review. The bundle also contains hardcoded references to https://claude.ai/settings/usage, https://chatgpt.com/codex/settings/usage, and https://api.openai.com/auth alongside session_id/model fields, indicating access to the installer's AI account session state next to the remote control channel. The combination of an obfuscated bundle, a hardcoded WebSocket control endpoint, network-driven local PTY/shell execution, SSH tunneling, and an author-server-driven self-replacement mechanism gives the operator of memory.whalent[...]com persistent full-host code execution on installer machines.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
